seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: KIDZ WIRELESS HEADPHONES - A pair of kid-friendly headphones designed to inspire a love of audio with quality sound and a comfortable fit. Safety comes first with these kid's headphones featuring a volume limiter and adjustable sound levels

WIRELESS OR WIRED - This pair of kid's headphones can be used wirelessly by connecting to any Bluetooth-enabled device or can be directly wired in with the handy 3.5mm audio cable for uninterrupted listening (audio cable included)

DELIVERS GREAT SOUND - Just because they're for kids doesn't mean we short-changed the quality, the Kidz wireless headphones feature 40mm drivers that deliver great sound to prevent any complaints and inspire an interest in audio in children

20 HOURS WIRELESS PLAYBACK - A long battery life gives kids plenty of time to enjoy music, audiobooks, or their favourite TV shows with crystal clear sound for up to 20 hours with every full charge. Charges with the included charging cable

COMFORTABLE FIT FOR ALL KIDS - An over-the-ear headset with an adjustable headband and soft ear pads, the KIDZ wireless headphones are designed to comfortably fit any child. Plus they also feature a built-in, hands-free microphone
description: From the manufacturer Wireless Audio Playback With a long battery life of up to 20 hours per charge, kids can enjoy music, audiobooks, or TV shows with crystal-clear sound. Charges with the included cable. Hands Free Microphone The built-in hands-free microphone allows for clear, effortless communication without the need to hold your device. Perfect for calls or voice commands. Soft Ear Pads The soft ear pads provide a comfortable fit, ensuring long-lasting wear without discomfort.
